backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the chat backend, defining types and state for chatrooms, messages, reactions, user profiles, and active users, with functions for access control, messaging, flagging, and blob storage via mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two chatroom header UI changes (removing the LIVE badge and repositioning the category tag) to their relevant source file and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React/TypeScript components, pages, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with cache-busting meta tags, a root div, and a versioned module script tag pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom, and admin routes, conditionally rendering the Header and Footer based on the current route.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to update their avatar by uploading an image, selecting a GIF via Giphy search/trending, or removing their current avatar.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component rendering a collapsible header (without LIVE badge, with category tag in the stats row), pinned video, scrollable message list with auto-scroll and target-message highlighting, reply context, and message input.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Renders a card for a chatroom with thumbnail previews for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media, displaying topic, category, live status, and participant counts.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Modal dialog for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post).
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Dialog that warns users before navigating to an external URL, showing the target link and requiring confirmation to proceed.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, back-to-lobby navigation when inside a chatroom, and an inline username editor with avatar picker.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing; authentication is intentionally not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders a single chat message with support for reactions, pinning, replies, media embeds (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, GIFs), link detection, voice playback, and reporting.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat input component supporting text messages, image uploads, GIF search via Giphy, voice recording, and auto-detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs in typed text.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video embed within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: Audio player component for voice messages featuring a play/pause toggle, a seekable waveform bar visualization, and playback time display.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay, returning the latest stable value after the delay has elapsed.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: Hook that purges stale or empty chatroom cache entries and forces a fresh refetch of the chatrooms list once the ICP actor becomes ready, exposing a recovery-in-progress flag.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity state) via a React context provider and hook, backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file exposing queries and mutations for chatrooms, messages, reactions, image uploads, and user identity (username/avatar) stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens), and includes mobile-specific input styles and custom voice message range input styling.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats numbers into compact human-readable strings (k, M, B suffixes).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy and fetch trending GIFs via the Giphy API, returning normalized `GiphyGif` arrays with preview and original URLs.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a lazy html2canvas loader module.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using an HTML canvas, with configurable max dimensions, quality, and progress callbacks.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a Twitter embed rendering module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe tweet preview fields (author, text, image), with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: localStorage cache layer for Twitter oEmbed preview data, supporting versioned entries with a 7-day expiration and cache key derivation from tweet IDs.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a Twitter thumbnail fetching module.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder or stub for a Twitter thumbnail cache module.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility functions for extracting video/post IDs and generating thumbnail or embed URLs for YouTube, Twitch (clips, VODs, live), and Twitter/X.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and an Internet Identity authentication provider wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists chatrooms with flagged message counts, supports filtering/searching, and allows deletion of individual chatrooms via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, increments its view count on mount, handles loading/error states, and renders the ChatArea component with an optional target message ID from query params.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Main lobby page displaying a searchable, filterable, algorithmically sorted list of chatrooms (live rooms first, then by view count), with a dialog to create new chatrooms.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, extended border radii, accordion keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Chattr app tracking existing features and a pending request to move the category tag next to the live viewer count and remove the LIVE badge from the chatroom header.
